summary: Phase 1 Refactoring (Estabilização e Fundação) fully tested and verified. All backend refactoring changes working correctly. 15/15 backend tests passed, 100% frontend tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ B-05: DI centralizado - All 5 controllers use Depends() for repository injection (lote_controller, layout_controller, account_mapping_controller, regra_controller, output_profile_controller)
✅ B-03: CNPJ.formatar() - Value Object static method used in lote_controller.py:40 and account_mapping_controller.py:35, no _formatar_cnpj duplicates found
✅ B-07: Logging estruturado - No print() statements in /app/backend/src, JSON logging configured via logging_config.py
✅ B-06: Índice layout_id - ix_lotes_layout_id index confirmed in SQLite database
✅ F-09: /home redirect - Correctly redirects to / (verified via Playwright)
✅ F-11: 404 page - Shows '404 Página não encontrada' with data-testid='not-found-page' and back-home link
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts - Returns layouts list (2 items)
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/campos-disponiveis - Returns all available fields
✅ API: GET /api/v1/import-layouts/{id} - Returns layout with cnpj, colunas, regras_conta
✅ API: GET /api/v1/output-profiles - Returns profiles list (2 items)
✅ Frontend: Dashboard renders without errors, stats cards display correctly
✅ Frontend: Navigation works between all pages (/layouts, /perfis-saida, /mapeamentos, /upload)
critical_code_review_comments: React Router v7 future flag warnings in console - Consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags for future compatibility
seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests was cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 refactoring verified: (1) DI centralized in /app/backend/src/config/dependencies.py with get_*_repository functions, (2) CNPJ.formatar() static method in value_objects.py used for formatting, (3) JSON logging via logging_config.py JSONFormatter, (4) ix_lotes_layout_id index on lotes table, (5) /home redirects to / via Navigate component, (6) 404 page with NotFoundPage component and data-testid attributes.

phase1_verification.B-05_DI_centralizado: VERIFIED - All controllers import from src.config.dependencies and use Depends()
phase1_verification.B-03_CNPJ_formatar: VERIFIED - CNPJ.formatar() used in 2 controllers, no duplicated _formatar_cnpj function
phase1_verification.B-07_logging_estruturado: VERIFIED - No print() in backend/src, JSONFormatter logging in place
phase1_verification.B-06_indice_layout_id: VERIFIED - ix_lotes_layout_id index exists in SQLite
phase1_verification.F-11_pagina_404: VERIFIED - 404 page with proper content and data-testid attributes
